calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated April 6, 2016 is admitted to probate. Bonnie Basso is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on April 25, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Isidor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
